name: fabricator
description: Fabricator helps create and maintain reliable Codex plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Create and maintain reliable Codex plugins.
interface.longDescription: Fabricator helps turn a plugin idea or an existing plugin into a clear, testable Codex workflow. Craft handles the creation and maintenance loop; publishing will arrive as a separate skill.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Fabricator: Craft to create or improve a Codex plugin in this project. Distinguish accumulation mode from implementation mode: while the user is collecting or clarifying findings, record and group them; once the user approves implementation, the scope includes source edits, validation, commit, scoped uninstall/hard-clean, reinstall from the intended local marketplace/source, installed cache/version verification, and restart/fresh-chat boundary unless explicitly narrowed. Prefer doing uninstall/install yourself with trusted Codex plugin commands before asking for manual UI work. When the user says they are testing a plugin or names a test chat/project, first verify that the installed runtime build matches the source version and that the test chat loaded that build; if not, stop and report the mismatch before analyzing results.
